title: parapholis × pauneroae
intro: Parapholis × pauneroae is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Parapholis strigosa and Pauneroa rigida. While limited information is available about its medicinal properties, some studies suggest that Parapholis × pauneroae may exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. However, more research is needed to confirm its health benefits and potential uses. No specific herbal preparations or traditional uses have been reported for Parapholis × pauneroae.
